Off Calendar May-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner PEOPLE's Motion For Order Striking Claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to respond to discovery would not result in compliance. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela Underwood, appeared for Plaintiff/Moving party
No other appearance
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set of Demand For Production Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
